prompt: A narrow urban alley at dusk with tall brick walls covered in graffiti on both sides, a dead-end wall ahead, dumpsters and scattered litter on the wet concrete ground, a dim orange streetlight overhead, fire escapes on the building walls, and a moody foggy atmosphere. Behind the viewer, the alley widens toward a cross street with passing car headlights and a convenience store with a lit sign. To the left, a narrow side passage branches off with flickering neon signs from a bar entrance, a metal staircase leading to upper floors, and steam venting from a kitchen exhaust duct. First-person viewer. First-person view at eye level, looking toward the dead end of the narrow alley.

scene_adherence.visible_part: A narrow urban alley at dusk has tall brick walls covered in graffiti on both sides, a dead-end wall ahead, dumpsters and scattered litter on the wet concrete ground, a dim orange streetlight overhead, fire escapes on the building walls, and a moody foggy atmosphere.

To the left, a narrow side passage branches off with flickering neon signs from a bar entrance, a metal staircase leading to upper floors, and steam venting from a kitchen exhaust duct.
